title: Role of Nrf2/HO-1 system in development, oxidative stress response and diseases: an evolutionarily conserved mechanism
summary: The multifunctional regulator nuclear factor erythroid 2-related factor (Nrf2) is considered not only as a cytoprotective factor regulating the expression of genes coding for anti-oxidant, anti-inflammatory and detoxifying proteins, but it is also a  (cited 2627x)
